title: Kerala Vegetable Stew
description: A flavorful and comforting stew originating from the Indian state of Kerala, made with a variety of vegetables and spices.

ingredients.name: crunchy
ingredients.notes: Mixed crunchy vegetables like carrots, cauliflower, and cabbage

ingredients.name: vegetables
ingredients.notes: Mixed vegetables like potatoes, zucchini, and green beans

ingredients.name: xtra
ingredients.notes: Extra virgin coconut oil for cooking

instructions: Heat xtra in a pan over medium heat.
Add crunchy and sauté until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add vegetables and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes.
Add gulab syrup and stir to combine.
